Cell-Center Velocity Error Report
Input NetCDF: gnot_predictions_30cases_400steps.nc
Trajectories: 30   Steps: 400
Reference variables: gt_u, gt_v
CC grid: 64 x 64

Metrics:
  RelL2 = sqrt(sum(du^2)+sum(dv^2)) / sqrt(sum(u_ref^2)+sum(v_ref^2))
  MaxErr = max sqrt(du^2 + dv^2)

  Method: GNOT
============================================================
